description: Every Suno feature, plus a local SQLite library, offline FTS5 search, MCP-native agent surface, and a single-binary Go install.

novel_features.name: Vibe recipes
novel_features.description: Save prompt + tag + persona + model bundles as named recipes and replay them with one-line topic substitution.

novel_features.name: A/B variant auto-picker
novel_features.description: Suno returns two clip variants per generation; this auto-ranks them on duration match, lyrics-word-count, and bitrate, downloads only the winner.

novel_features.name: Credit burn analytics
novel_features.description: Cross-table aggregation showing credits spent by tag, persona, model, or hour-of-day over a window.

novel_features.name: Persona leaderboard
novel_features.description: Ranks the user's voice personas by which produced the most-liked, most-played, or most-extended clips.

novel_features.name: Lineage tree
novel_features.description: Walks parent_id and direct_children recursively to render the ASCII tree of an extend/concat/cover/remaster ancestry.

novel_features.name: Reachability self-test
novel_features.description: Beyond standard health checks: fires a zero-credit lyrics-only generation to confirm the live generate path is reachable and not intercepted by CAPTCHA.

novel_features.name: Credit-budget guard
novel_features.description: Sets a daily or monthly credit cap; generate refuses to submit when the projected spend would exceed the cap.

novel_features.name: Prompt evolution
novel_features.description: Takes an existing clip's full parameter bundle and mutates one axis (tag, persona, model) for a focused re-roll.

novel_features.name: Ship pack
novel_features.description: One-shot publishing bundle: MP3 with ID3+USLT+SYLT, MP4, cover PNG, LRC subtitle, JSON sidecar of metadata.

novel_features.name: Reroll until match
novel_features.description: Resubmits a prompt until a returned variant lands in the requested duration window or attempts run out.

novel_features.name: Sessionized history
novel_features.description: Groups recent generations into ~30-minute-gap sessions and reports per-session credit spend, persona usage, and tag drift.
